text.title: Portfolio Sunset Decision Frame Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator script enforces required keys and forbidden patterns.

example.note: Missing required fields; violates schema constraints for `portfolio-sunset-decision-frame`. Validator rejects with explicit violation list.

section.title: Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: decision not in {sunset, sell, open-source, hold, double-down}
